title: TotemPWGood
description: Totem PWGood and the replaced sound
body:
Resource pack replacing the totem of undying on **PWGood**
it also replaces the classic totem sounds

about the model:

<details>
<summary>Model</summary>

The model replaces the totem with the **PWGood** in an oblong hat

</details>

<details>
<summary>Sounds</summary>

add new sounds for totem of undying

</details>
